name: Minecraft Launcher
css: .mc-container{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;flex:1}.mc-titlebar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 12px;background:#2d2d2d;border-radius:8px 8px 0 0;flex-shrink:0;cursor:move}.mc-titlebar .win-icon{display:flex;color:#7ec850;margin-right:6px}.mc-titlebar .window-title{color:#eee;font-size:13px;font-weight:500}.mc-versions{display:flex;gap:12px;padding:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1a1a2e,#16213e);flex-shrink:0;justify-content:center;border-bottom:2px solid #7ec850}.mc-ver{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:16px 40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:#ccc;font-family:inherit}.mc-ver:hover{border-color:#7ec850;background:rgba(126,200,80,0.1);color:#fff;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(126,200,80,0.2)}.mc-ver.active{border-color:#7ec850;background:rgba(126,200,80,0.15);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(126,200,80,0.3)}.mc-ver-icon{font-size:32px;line-height:1}.mc-ver-label{font-size:16px;font-weight:600}.mc-ver-sub{font-size:11px;color:#888}.mc-content{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#0a0a0a}.mc-frame{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;position:absolute;top:0;left:0}.mc-loading{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:10;color:#7ec850;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;text-align:center}.mc-loading:after{content:'';display:block;width:32px;height:32px;margin:12px auto 0;border:3px solid rgba(126,200,80,0.2);border-top-color:#7ec850;border-radius:50%;animation:mc-spin .8s linear infinite}@keyframes mc-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
js:
AppManager.register('minecraft',{init:function(b,win){b.className='mc-container';b.innerHTML='';var tb=TK.el('div',{className:'mc-titlebar'});tb.innerHTML='
'+TK.icon(win.icon||'folder','icon-svg-sm')+''+(win.title||'Minecraft Launcher')+'
';b.appendChild(tb);var vs=TK.el('div',{className:'mc-versions'});var v1=TK.el('button',{className:'mc-ver active','data-ver':'1.8.8'});v1.innerHTML='⛏1.8.8Antiga';var v2=TK.el('button',{className:'mc-ver','data-ver':'1.12.2'});v2.innerHTML='⛏1.12.2Moderna';vs.appendChild(v1);vs.appendChild(v2);b.appendChild(vs);var ld=TK.el('div',{className:'mc-loading',style:{display:'none'}});ld.textContent='Carregando...';b.appendChild(ld);var ce=TK.el('div',{className:'mc-content'});b.appendChild(ce);var fr=document.createElement('iframe');fr.className='mc-frame';ce.appendChild(fr);var urls={'1.8.8':'https://eaglercraft.q13x.com/1.8.8/js/?retina=true','1.12.2':'https://eaglercraft.q13x.com/1.12.2/js/?retina=true'};var cv='1.8.8';function lv(ver){cv=ver;fr.src=urls[ver];ld.style.display='';[v1,v2].forEach(function(x){x.classList.toggle('active',x.getAttribute('data-ver')===ver)})}fr.onload=function(){ld.style.display='none'};fr.onerror=function(){ld.textContent='Erro ao carregar. O site pode bloquear iframes.'};v1.onclick=function(){lv('1.8.8')};v2.onclick=function(){lv('1.12.2')};lv('1.8.8')}})
